production.definition: The act of producing, making or creating something.

gum.definition: (often in the plural) The flesh around the teeth.

the.definition: With a comparative or with more and a verb phrase, establishes a correlation with one or more other such comparatives.

since.definition: From a specified time in the past.

subsidiary.definition: A company owned by a parent company or a holding company, also called daughter company or sister company.

company.definition: A team; a group of people who work together professionally.

earliest.definition: At a time in advance of the usual or expected event.

been.definition: A flying insect, of the clade Anthophila within the hymenopteran superfamily Apoidea, known for its organised societies (though only a minority have them), for collecting pollen and (in some species) producing wax and honey.

chewing.definition: To crush with the teeth by repeated closing and opening of the jaws; done to food to soften it and break it down by the action of saliva before it is swallowed.

still.definition: A period of calm or silence.

introduced.definition: (of people) To cause (someone) to be acquainted (with someone else).

that.definition: Something being indicated that is there; one of those.

fruit.definition: (often in the plural) In general, a product of plant growth useful to man or animals.

developed.definition: To change with a specific direction, progress.

environment.definition: The surroundings of, and influences on, a particular item of interest.

mission.definition: A set of tasks that fulfills a purpose or duty; an assignment set by an employer, or by oneself.

graphics.definition: The making of architectural or design drawings.

playing.definition: To act in a manner such that one has fun; to engage in activities expressly for the purpose of recreation or entertainment.

fully.definition: In a full manner; without lack or defect.

fantasy.definition: That which comes from one's imagination.

released.definition: To let go (of); to cease to hold or contain.

both.definition: Each of the two, or of the two kinds.

futuristic.definition: Of technology, a concept, etc, so far advanced as to appear to be from the future.

like.definition: (usually in the plural) Something that a person likes (prefers).

its.definition: One who is neither a he nor a she; a creature; a dehumanized being.

role.definition: A character or part played by a performer or actor.

elements.definition: One of the simplest or essential parts or principles of which anything consists, or upon which the constitution or fundamental powers of anything are based.

published.definition: To issue (something, such as printed work) for distribution and/or sale.

front.definition: The foremost side of something or the end that faces the direction it normally moves.

committee.definition: A body of one or more persons convened for the accomplishment of some specific purpose, typically with formal protocols.

composed.definition: To make something by merging parts.

union.definition: The act of uniting or joining two or more things into one.

society.definition: A long-standing group of people sharing cultural aspects such as language, dress, norms of behavior and artistic forms.

social.definition: A festive gathering to foster introductions.

consultative.definition: That gives advice or consultation; advisory.

employers.definition: A person, firm or other entity which pays for or hires the services of another person.

assembly.definition: A set of pieces that work together in unison as a mechanism or device.

which.definition: (interrogative) What one or ones (of those mentioned or implied).

regions.definition: Any considerable and connected part of a space or surface; specifically, a tract of land or sea of considerable but indefinite extent; a country; a district; in a broad sense, a place without special reference to location or extent but viewed as an entity for geographical, social or cultural reasons.

workers.definition: A person who performs labor for a living, especially manual labor.

shares.definition: A portion of something, especially a portion given or allotted to someone.

civil.definition: Having to do with people and government office as opposed to the military or religion.

initial.definition: The first letter of a word or a name.

high.definition: A high point or position, literally or figuratively; an elevated place; a superior region; a height; the sky; heaven.

sheriff.definition: (except Scotland) (High Sheriff) An official of a shire or county office, responsible for carrying out court orders, law enforcement and other duties.

baronet.definition: A hereditary title, below a peerage and senior to most knighthoods, entitling the bearer to the titular prefix "Sir" (for men) or "Dame" (for women) which is used in conjunction with the holder's Christian name. It is inheritable, usually by the eldest son, although a few baronetcies can also pass through the female line.

heavyweight.definition: A very large, heavy, or impressive person.

franklin.definition: A freeholder, especially as belonging to a class of landowners in the 14th and 15th century ranking below the gentry.

boxing.definition: To place inside a box; to pack in one or more boxes.

wood.definition: The substance making up the central part of the trunk and branches of a tree. Used as a material for construction, to manufacture various items, etc. or as fuel.

characterized.definition: To depict someone or something a particular way (often negative).

source.definition: The person, place or thing from which something (information, goods, etc.) comes or is acquired.

derived.definition: To obtain or receive (something) from something else.

zebrawood.definition: Any wood with a figure (grain pattern) like the striping of a zebra, most often wood of the genus Microberlinia.

broadcasting.definition: To transmit a message or signal through radio waves or electronic means.

personality.definition: A set of non-physical psychological and social qualities that make a person (or thing) distinct from another.

lions.definition: A big cat, Panthera leo, native to Africa, India and formerly much of Europe.

falcons.definition: Any bird of the genus Falco, all of which are birds of prey.

raiders.definition: One who engages in a raid; a plunderer.

del.definition: The symbol ∇ used to denote the gradient operator.

buried.definition: Placed in a grave at a burial.

victims.definition: One that is harmed—killed, injured, subjected to oppression, deceived, or otherwise adversely affected—by someone or something, especially another person or event, force, or condition; in particular:

commemorate.definition: To honour the memory of someone or something with a ceremony or object.

plague.definition: (often used with the, sometimes capitalized: the Plague) The bubonic plague, the pestilent disease caused by the virulent bacterium Yersinia pestis.

jingo.definition: One who supports policy favouring war.

terry.definition: A type of coarse cotton fabric covered in many small raised loops that is used to make towels, bathrobes and some types of nappy/diaper.

concept.definition: An abstract and general idea; an abstraction.

jingoism.definition: Excessive patriotism or aggressive nationalism, especially with regards to foreign policy.

ideal.definition: A perfect standard of beauty, intellect etc., or a standard of excellence to aim at.

type.definition: A grouping based on shared characteristics; a class.

converted.definition: To transform or change (something) into another form, substance, state, or product.

categorized.definition: To assign a category; to divide into classes.

private.definition: A soldier of the lowest rank in the army.

linear.definition: Having the form of a line; straight or roughly straight; following a direct course.

class.definition: A group, collection, category or set sharing characteristics or attributes.

ship.definition: A water-borne vessel generally larger than a boat.

sank.definition: (heading, physical) To move or be moved into something.

cannon.definition: A complete assembly, consisting of an artillery tube and a breech mechanism, firing mechanism or base cap, which is a component of a gun, howitzer or mortar. It may include muzzle appendages.

escort.definition: A group of people or vehicles, generally armed, who go with a person or people of importance to safeguard them on a journey or mission.

ball.definition: A solid or hollow sphere, or roughly spherical mass.

media.definition: The middle layer of the wall of a blood vessel or lymph vessel which is composed of connective and muscular tissue.

drag.definition: Resistance of the air (or some other fluid) to something moving through it.

docu.definition: A film, TV program, publication etc. which presents a social, political, scientific or historical subject in a factual or informative manner.

performer.definition: One who performs for, or entertains, an audience.

featured.definition: To ascribe the greatest importance to something within a certain context.

gem.definition: A precious stone, usually of substantial monetary value or prized for its beauty or shine.

inn.definition: Any establishment where travellers can procure lodging, food, and drink.

piper.definition: A musician who plays a pipe.

pub.definition: A public house where beverages, primarily alcoholic, may be bought and consumed, also providing food and sometimes entertainment such as live music or television.

highly.definition: In a high or esteemed manner.

actress.definition: A female who performs on the stage or in films.

ballads.definition: A kind of narrative poem, adapted for recitation or singing; especially, a sentimental or romantic poem in short stanzas.

scenes.definition: The location of an event that attracts attention.

special.definition: A reduction in consumer cost (usually for a limited time) for items or services rendered.

virgin.definition: A person who has never had sexual intercourse, or sometimes, one who has never engaged in any sexual activity at all.

snow.definition: The frozen, crystalline state of water that falls as precipitation.

jun.definition: A monetary unit of North Korea and formerly of South Korea, equal to one hundredth of a won.

fan.definition: A hand-held device consisting of concertinaed material, or slats of material, gathered together at one end, that may be opened out into the shape of a sector of a circle and waved back and forth in order to move air towards oneself and cool oneself.

wrote.definition: To form letters, words or symbols on a surface in order to communicate.

regional.definition: An entity or event with scope limited to a single region.

system.definition: A collection of organized things; a whole composed of relationships among its members.

nineteenth.definition: The person or thing in the nineteenth position.

lantern.definition: A case of translucent or transparent material made to protect a flame, or light, used to illuminate its surroundings.

cages.definition: An enclosure made of bars, normally to hold animals.

lighthouses.definition: A tower or other structure exhibiting a light or lights to warn or guide sailors.

bird.definition: A member of the class of animals Aves in the phylum Chordata, characterized by being warm-blooded, having feathers and wings usually capable of flight, and laying eggs.

cage.definition: An enclosure made of bars, normally to hold animals.

lanterns.definition: A case of translucent or transparent material made to protect a flame, or light, used to illuminate its surroundings.

wire.definition: Metal formed into a thin, even thread, now usually by being drawn through a hole in a steel die.

industry.definition: The tendency to work persistently. Diligence.

peanut.definition: A legume resembling a nut, the fruit of the plant Arachis hypogaea.

supergroup.definition: Any group composed of other groups.

rappers.definition: One who, or that which, raps or knocks.

thang.definition: That which is considered to exist as a separate entity, object, quality or concept.

mack.definition: An individual skilled in the art of seduction using verbal skills.

cube.definition: A regular polyhedron having six identical square faces.

low.definition: Something that is low; a low point.

succeeded.definition: To follow in order; to come next after; hence, to take the place of.

profile.definition: The outermost shape, view, or edge of an object.

circle.definition: A two-dimensional geometric figure, a line, consisting of the set of all those points in a plane that are equally distant from a given point (center).

damn.definition: The use of "damn" as a curse.

euphorbia.definition: Any plant of the genus Euphorbia, the spurges.

manufactured.definition: To make things, usually on a large scale, with tools and either physical labor or machinery.

marketed.definition: To make (products or services) available for sale and promote them.

axis.definition: An imaginary line around which an object spins (an axis of rotation) or is symmetrically arranged (an axis of symmetry).

departmental.definition: Of or pertaining to a department.

coffee.definition: A beverage made by infusing the beans of the coffee plant in hot water.

capital.definition: Already-produced durable goods available for use as a factor of production, such as steam shovels (equipment) and office buildings (structures).
